expectations.evidence: Output includes CWV-01 to CWV-03 for LCP, CWV-04 to CWV-06 for INP, CWV-07 to CWV-11 for CLS. Each metric is explicitly named with target thresholds (LCP 2.5s, INP 200ms, CLS 0.1).
All 11 CWV items (CWV-01 through CWV-11) are listed in a structured table with code, metric, item name, result, and findings columns.
Each item is evaluated as N/A with explanation that no web source files were changed. Summary confirms all 11 items evaluated with no CWV impact.

eval_feedback.overall: The with_skill run produced a comprehensive, structured CWV analysis with all 11 checklist items in a table, metric thresholds, and clear N/A reasoning for non-web files.
